company_name: SANXO-SYSTEMS Finn-Magyar Méréstechnikai és Automatizálási Kf
profile_meta_description: SANXO-Systems Ltd is a technology company that develops and delivers advanced hardware and software solutions in the fields of digital microscopy, machine vision, and robotic automation.  A core area of the company’s expertise is in digital industrial microscopes, especially the SANXO-Scope series, which are designed for high-quality magnified imaging, measurement, and inspection tasks. In addition to microscopy, SANXO provides machine vision systems that include industrial cameras, optics, lighting, and custom software to automate inspection and quality control processes in manufacturing. Its machine vision solutions are used to reduce labor costs, increase accuracy, and support automated guidance of robots on production lines.

profile_meta_description: Basler is a leading manufacturer of high-quality cameras and camera accessories for industry, medicine, traffic and a variety of other markets. The company's product portfolio encompasses area scan and line scan cameras in compact housing dimensions, camera modules in board level variants for embedded vision solutions, and 3D cameras. The catalog is rounded off by our user-friendly pylon SDK plus a broad spectrum of accessories, including several developed specially for Basler and optimally harmonized for our cameras. Basler has three decades of experience in computer vision. The company is home to approximately 600 employees, at its headquarters in Ahrensburg, Germany, and at its subsidiaries and sales offices in Europe, Asia, and North America.

company_name: Nuevas Técnicas de Automatización Industrial S.L. (NUTAI)
profile_meta_description: At NUTAI, we design and deliver cutting-edge technological solutions in industrial automation, leveraging advanced robotics, machine vision, artificial intelligence (AI), and machine tool technologies to transform production environments. With over 30 years of experience across diverse industrial sectors —including automotive, sustainable mobility, energy, and Industry 4.0— we lead turnkey projects that optimize processes.  Recognized as an Innovative SME by the Spanish Government since 2016 and actively collaborating with industry leaders across Europe, our multidisciplinary team combines deep technical expertise with a client-focused approach to develop tailor-made automation solutions and proprietary products. Our offerings range from intelligent robotics and real-time machine vision systems to AI-driven quality control and integrated digital manufacturing platforms.

profile_meta_description: MVTec Software GmbH is a leading international manufacturer of software for machine vision used in all demanding areas of imaging like the semi-conductor industry, inspection, optical quality control, metrology, medicine, or surveillance. In particular, software by MVTec enables new automation solutions in settings of the Industrial Internet of Things.  MVTec is the developer and vendor of the general purpose machine vision software products HALCON and MERLIC. Furthermore, MVTec builds customized software solutions for machine vision - from consultancy, studies, and prototypes up to integrated products.

profile_meta_description: With headquarters in Lévis, Québec, Canada and Lake Mary, Florida, USA, FARO CREAFORM is the result of the combination of FARO’s renowned 3D Measurement business segment and Creaform’s innovative metrology solutions. With roots dating back to 1981, FARO has been a global leader in portable measurement arms, laser trackers, and reality capture technologies. Creaform, founded in 2002 in Lévis, Québec, has revolutionized handheld 3D scanning and automated inspection, serving thousands of professionals in automotive, aerospace, manufacturing, and research. Together, FARO CREAFORM empowers quality, production, maintenance and design teams to work faster, smarter, and with total confidence, unlocking better outcomes and superior experiences across manufacturing workflows. FARO CREAFORM is a business unit of AMETEK, Inc., a leading global provider of industrial technology solutions serving a diverse set of attractive niche markets with annual sales of over $7.0 billion.

profile_meta_description: Temposonics is a global leader in the field of magnetostrictive measurement technology. For 50 years, we have pioneered the industry, embodying innovation and maximum reliability. Specializing in high-precision linear position sensors and level transmitters, Temposonics offers the broadest range of magnetostrictive sensor solutions in terms of design, output, and performance. Our non-contact sensors provide accurate and dynamic position and velocity measurements for automation and safety-critical systems in industrial machinery, off-highway vehicles, and process industries.  We have manufacturing facilities in Lüdenscheid and Dortmund (Germany) and Cary (NC, USA) with direct sales offices and authorized distributors worldwide. Thanks to our many years of experience and focus on our core technology, based on the principle of magnetostriction, we are always one step ahead of industry trends. Our customers benefit from a combination of application knowledge, service and collaboration.

profile_meta_description: Cobro Robot Technologies is a technology-driven automation company based in Teknopark Istanbul, specializing in turnkey robotic automation solutions for industrial applications. We design and integrate collaborative and industrial robot systems for assembly, machine tending, packaging, palletizing, quality inspection, and material handling processes.  In addition to turnkey projects, Cobro develops proprietary R&D products, including a locally developed flexible feeding system (CEBS) combined with AI-powered vision solutions for precise part detection and robot guidance. Our solutions aim to increase production efficiency, reduce dependency on imported systems, and shorten commissioning times.  With strong expertise in collaborative robotics, vision integration, and industrial automation, Cobro delivers reliable, scalable, and cost-effective solutions tailored to customer needs in automotive, food, white goods, and general manufacturing industries.

profile_meta_description: ZEISS Industrial Quality Solutions is a leading manufacturer of multidimensional metrology solutions. These include coordinate measuring machines, optical and multisensor systems, microscopy systems for industrial quality assurance as well as metrology software for the automotive, aircraft, mechanical engineering, plastics and medical technology industries. Innovative technologies such as 3D X-ray metrology for quality inspection round off the portfolio. In addition, ZEISS Industrial Quality Solutions offers a broad global spectrum of customer services with ZEISS Quality Excellence Centers close to its customers. The company is headquartered in Oberkochen. Production and development sites outside Germany are located in Minneapolis in the USA, Shanghai (China) and Bangalore (India). ZEISS Industrial Quality Solutions is part of the Industrial Quality & Research segment.

profile_meta_description: SMARTTECH is a Polish manufacturer of 3D scanners for industry, medicine and archeology.  SMARTTECH optical measuring systems together with specialized software enable precise digitalization and later dimensioning of the object, which is of particular importantce for industry (reverse engineering, quality control, rapid prototyping). The non-contact measurement method is highly attractive for medical usage and precise prosthesis production. Possibility to collect realistic texture opens the technology to such applications as national heritage documentation or later visualization for various purposes. During the fair company will be presented MICRON3D color 10 Mpix –innovative metrology certified 3D scanner givig information of both shape and texture (color) of measured object. Fully mobile device enablin rapid 3D measurement of scanned object.

profile_meta_description: Since its founding, COMAC CAL s.r.o. has been dedicated to advancing the field of measurement and sensor technology.  With our own dedicated development center, we specialize in delivering custom solutions that perfectly align with our clients' unique requirements across diverse industrial sectors. Our roots reach back to 1987, starting with the development of residential heat meters. Since those early days, we have expanded into a world-class provider of complex measuring systems.  We pride ourselves on solving specific technical challenges and finding the optimal starting point for any project. Furthermore, our authorized Metrological and Calibration Center allows us to fully verify and certify every sensor and system designed by our expert team.

profile_meta_description: Comeco has over 35 years of experience in manufacturing and providing services related to industrial measurement, control, and automation. The company was founded in 1989 and in a short timeframe, developed and started producing its own range of products including analog and digital transmitters, controllers, indicators, and sensors to provide for end-to-end measurement, control, and automation solutions.  Comeco has its own manufacturing facility based in Plovdiv, Bulgaria where it has implemented the quality control system ISO 9001:2015. The company has a developed domestic and international distributor network.  Our calibration laboratory is certified by ISO 17025:2018 and offers calibration of primary physical quantities for products made by Comeco and by other manufacturers.

profile_meta_description: At Hexagon, we don’t just measure the world – we define its future. As the global leader in measurement technologies, we provide the confidence that vital industries rely on to build, navigate, and innovate. From microns to Mars, our solutions drive productivity, quality, safety, and sustainability across aerospace, agriculture, automotive, construction, manufacturing, and mining. Yet measurement is only the beginning. We bridge the physical and digital worlds with cutting-edge metrology, reality capture, and positioning solutions – making industries and cities safer, smarter, and more sustainable. Looking forward we are striving to enable our customers to meet sustainability and demographic challenges – ultimately advancing them towards truly autonomous solutions.Measurement is the foundation of progress. When it has to be right, it has to be Hexagon.

Since its formation in 1958, Vision Engineering has become one of the world's most innovative and dynamic microscope manufacturers, with offices across Europe, Asia and North America. Vision Engineering's main manufacturing base is at Send near Woking in Surrey, UK. Engineers and scientists worldwide use our systems for a wide range of general magnification, inspection and measurement application in both industrial and life science markets. More than 300,000 units have been installed worldwide to date.
